name: ChatWaifu
short_description: ChatWaifu is an Offline AI voice companion without internet required. One-click install latest LLM, optimized for low-end PCs with instant TTS. Support 3sec voice cloning, shareable voices directly in workshop. Integrates local tools for web access/news/weather/PC Control while staying fully offline
detailed_description:
ChatWaifu is an Offline AI voice companion without internet required. One-click install latest LLM, optimized for low-end PCs with instant TTS. Support 3-second voice cloning, shareable voices directly in workshop. Integrates local tools for web access/news/weather/PC Control while staying fully offline

Features

  • Fully offline AI desktop voice companion that offers private, secure play without internet access.

  • Supports one-click import of various mainstream local AI large language model file

  • Supports fast inference using Nvidia and AMD graphics cards and even CPUs

  • Support real-time TTS for voice chat and interaction

  • Supports one-click import of 3D characters model

  • Supports GPTSoVITS2's 3-second voice cloning, allowing users to download and share character voices from the workshop

  • Character models support custom outfits and custom poses, and can be auto switched by AI

  • Supports LLM Function-Call to auto call tools to assist in information retrieval and script execution

  • Supports easily custom tools for querying information such as weather or news from the web, and supports JavaScript

  • Optimized 3D-to-2D anime rendering engine

  • Support workshop

  • Support multi-language

  • Optimized code and lower resource usage

  • Compatible with all other game, software and live wallpapers

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
